vocabulary.example_sentence: What does this word mean in Chinese?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这个词中文是什么意思？

vocabulary.example_sentence: Her husband likes to play chess with the family.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她的丈夫喜欢和家人一起下棋。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He bought a new ping-pong bat yesterday.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他昨天买了一支新乒乓球拍。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Tom keeps his ping-pong bat in his school bag.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 汤姆把乒乓球拍放在书包里。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We play ping-pong together after school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们放学后一起打乒乓球。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The family spends a lot of time together on weekends.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这家人周末经常一起度过很多时光。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My grandfather goes fishing every day.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我爷爷每天都去钓鱼。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He cleaned his fishing rod after the trip.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 旅行结束后他清理了钓竿。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We spend an hour on chess activities every week.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们每周花一小时做象棋活动。

vocabulary.example_sentence: They have a lot of fun family activities together.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他们一起进行许多有趣的家庭活动。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I really enjoy playing Chinese chess with my grandpa.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我真的很喜欢跟爷爷下中国象棋。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Each member of the club has a hobby to share.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 俱乐部的每位成员都有一个爱好可以分享。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our family activity this Sunday is fishing.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们这个周日的家庭活动是钓鱼。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Chess is a quiet activity for two players.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 国际象棋是两个人玩的安静活动。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My father taught me Chinese chess when I was young.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我小时候爸爸教过我中国象棋。

vocabulary.example_sentence: My grandparent tells funny stories at night.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我的祖父母晚上讲有趣的故事。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Sam has a funny hat that makes everyone laugh.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 萨姆有一顶让大家发笑的滑稽帽子。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We laugh a lot when we watch funny videos together.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们一起看搞笑视频时会笑个不停。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Kate and Lily have different hobbies.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 凯特和莉莉有不同的爱好。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Jane plays the violin in the school band.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 简在学校乐队里拉小提琴。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The family have fun when they go hiking.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这家人去远足时玩得很开心。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Fred wears a handsome hat at night.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 弗雷德晚上戴着一顶好看的帽子。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Jim looks handsome in his new hat.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 吉姆戴上新帽子看起来很英俊。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Lucy hurt her knee on the hike.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 露西远足时膝盖受了伤。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Grandparent reads to us at night.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 祖父母晚上给我们读书。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Jack sits in the middle next to Sarah.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 杰克坐在中间，紧挨着萨拉。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Each grandchild loves to laugh with grandparent.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 每个孙辈都喜欢和祖父母一起笑。

vocabulary.example_sentence: David is the son of Mr Wood.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 戴维是伍德先生的儿子。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We hike in the hills every weekend.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们每个周末去山里远足。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Oscar and Sam go hiking with their father.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 奥斯卡和萨姆跟他们的父亲去远足。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Ireland is next to the UK on the map.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 在地图上爱尔兰紧邻英国。

vocabulary.example_sentence: David plays chess with his brother Jim.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 戴维和弟弟吉姆下棋。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Jim spends time with his family every day.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 吉姆每天都和家人在一起。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Kate is a member of our school activity club.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 凯特是我们学校活动俱乐部的成员。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Lily really loves her violin lessons.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 莉莉真的很喜欢小提琴课。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Fred comes from Ireland.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 弗雷德来自爱尔兰。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Fred is a handsome boy in our class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 弗雷德是我们班一个英俊的男孩。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Sam and Jack are twin brothers.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 萨姆和杰克是双胞胎兄弟。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Jane plays the violin for the family.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 简为家人拉小提琴。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Jack sits next to Sarah in class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 杰克在课上坐在萨拉旁边。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Sarah laughs at funny stories from Oscar.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 萨拉听奥斯卡讲的有趣故事时会笑。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Oscar goes hiking with Lucy on Sundays.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 奥斯卡周日和露西去远足。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Lucy is the grandchild of our neighbour.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 露西是我们邻居的孙女。
